## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Updated docs (`README` / `docs/`) where behavior or flags changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real attack telemetry included
- [ ] Flood/benchmark changes keep the loopback-only safety guards intact
